funFacts: To make one pound of honey, a colony of Honeybees on Wildflowerss must visit over two million flowers and fly 55,000 miles.
Designed for Hard difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing clean borders and line work using acrylic or light watercolors.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
